session.name: MPI-127 LTX-2.3 — Phases 4/5/4.5 landed + verified; engine kornia+MpiNodes unblocked; verification mid-flight

goal.original: Stand up the LTX-2.3 video model family in Cubric Vision (model entry + deps + ops + audio-mode UI + audio-as-input-media), then verify end-to-end and finish the plan.
goal.summary: Phases 4 (model entry, flat deps), 5 (audio-mode radio), and the drift-discovered 4.5 (audio as first-class INPUT media: drop/upload/gallery-card/play-stop/chip) are all CODE-COMPLETE, lint-clean, and VERIFIED in-app, including a t2v generation with audio in the output (Original + Reference). Two engine blockers were diagnosed + fixed this session (kornia 0.8.2 pin, stale MpiNodes bump). Remaining: i2v+audio gen, the i2v op-gating dropdown issue, whatever failed the LATEST verify attempt, then Phase 6 (rules/release:check) + ship tasks.

next_action.description: FIRST: RESTART the app/ComfyUI (engine kornia + MpiNodes fixes need a reload), then reproduce the user's latest verification attempt and capture the NEW error (console + last 100 lines of logs/app.log) — do NOT assume it's kornia/MpiNodes again, those are fixed. Diagnose + fix that. THEN verify i2v+audio (#10), investigate the i2v op-gating dropdown issue (LTX won't let you select Image to Video), finish Phase 6 (component-comfy.md + release:check), and run mpic-compute-dep-hashes. Also remove the temporary param-dump console.log in MpiPromptBox.js getRunPayload.

key_decisions: LTX is a FLAT model (dependencies[], not commonDeps/operations) — one transformer serves t2v+i2v, no separable install unit, no per-op toggle. This is WHY the i2v-gating issue may exist: getAvailableCommands gates ops via installedOps for operations-keyed models; a flat model resolves differently. Investigate there.

Audio is first-class input media: drop→upload→gallery audio card (play/STOP, length m:ss, non-click-through) + prompt-box chip with filename. Sidecar type:'audio' in .meta/<uuid>.json. createAudioItem in projectModel.js.
audioMode radio is a proper PromptBoxControl (PROMPT_BOX_CONTROLS.audioMode), capability-gated by model.capabilities.audio; previewStage gated by capabilities.multiStage (LTX=false this release).

Engine custom nodes are NOT installed via a manager for the local dev app — they live in engine/ComfyUI_windows_portable/ComfyUI/custom_nodes/. To update one, sync from source + RESTART ComfyUI. node_lock.json is the durable source (app + Pod consume it).
kornia MUST be pinned 0.8.2 for ComfyUI-LTXVideo (0.8.3 removed pyramid.pad). New `pipPins` dep field handles this durably; the local engine was hand-fixed.
MpiNodes current = 780c7c3c (local repo C:/AI/Mpi/ComfyUi-MpiNodes, pushed). Adds MpiReroute + MpiConditioningReroute. 'IMG2' workflow node = a renamed MpiReroute.
